basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Program Associate II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IIT Gandhinagar) Program Associate II (Technology Transfer) Notification 2026 has been released on 23 April 2026 on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Gandhinagar Program Associate II (Technology Transfer) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Science, Business Administration (MBA), or Law; OR a Graduate degree in Engineering.
qualification.details: Master's degree in Science, Business Administration (MBA), or Law; OR a Graduate degree in Engineering. Minimum 2 years of experience in technology transfer, patent licensing, business development, or IP management at a legal firm, academic TTO, or industry. Specific experience in drafting contracts or agreements (e.g., licensing, MoUs). The percentage/grade points with respect to the academic qualifications will be a minimum of 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onward and 55% or equivalent grade in class 10th and 12th.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Gandhinagar Program Associate II (Technology Transfer) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application is 10 May 2026. It is advisable to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Program Associate II (Technology Transfer) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Program Associate II (Technology Transfer) position in this recruitment drive by IIT Gandhinagar.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in Science, MBA, or Law, or a Graduate degree in Engineering, along with relevant experience as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Program Associate II (Technology Transfer) role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 50,000/- to Rs. 78,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for this recruitment must be submitted through the online mode only.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Program Associate II (Technology Transfer) is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the job location for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job location is Gandhinagar, Gujarat.

faq.question: Q9. Does IIT Gandhinagar offer age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify details regarding age relaxation. Candidates are advised to refer to the detailed advertisement for this information.

faq.question: Q10. What kind of experience is required for the Program Associate II (Technology Transfer) post?
faq.answer: A minimum of 2 years of experience in technology transfer, patent licensing, business development, or IP management is required, with specific experience in drafting contracts or agreements.
